creator: sigsys@gmail.com
text:
After updating a 12-STABLE machine from r358905 to r360653, I sometimes get panics not long after boot.  Seems like it might be happening about half of the time.  The system seems stable (so far) if it doesn't crash not long after boot.  The problem might have been there before that upate but I just didn't notice it because I got lucky.
